info.title: Google Ads API
info.description: Google Ads API for programmatic management of Google Ads campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, bidding strategies, budgets, audiences, and reporting. Provides search, mutate, and reporting interfaces for all Google Ads resources.

post.description: Execute a GAQL query and stream results. Use this for large result sets.
